title: Channel guard: deny raw writes to the issues and sprints homes (feature flag, default off)
description: Add a PreToolUse channel guard that denies raw `Write`/`Edit` to `.excn/issues/` and `.excn/sprints/`, with a deny reason that redirects to the `to-execution` CLI. Model it on `progress-location-guard`: a `*-rules.cjs` data module (homes, deny-reason template, placeholder) separate from the decision logic. Add a `hooks-config` feature flag, default OFF in the Template (no auto-lockout); enabling on this Instance is sequenced later (EXEC-102, after CLI adoption).
acceptance_criteria: Raw `Write`/`Edit` to `.excn/issues/` or `.excn/sprints/` is denied with a reason that names the `to-execution` CLI
The guard never sees the helper's own writes (helper writes via fs, not the Write tool) — verified
Data/logic split mirrors `progress-location-guard`; homes and deny-reason are named constants in a `-rules.cjs` module — sprint-5 lesson
Fail-safe: missing/malformed config or payload, or internal error, exits 0 and never blocks a write (ADR-0006)
New `hooks-config` feature key added to the schema; default OFF in the Template
Guard subsumes the monolith-shape and uuid/serialization checks (no schema logic in the hook)
